content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Broad rally across sectors (Pharma, FMCG, Defense, Capital Goods, IT, NBFC) with many holdings showing strong gains today. Several positions sit on top of recent earnings prints with binary calendars (HAL May 14, HINDPETRO May 13). Cumulative experiment P&L at -53.72% demands aggressive risk discipline — focus today is locking gains via SL trails, not adding new full-size positions on top of an already 11-name book.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24000,
      "nifty_resistance": 24800
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1035.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 1056.70 vs entry 984 = +7.4% unrealized. SL already at 1035 sits ~2% below CMP — appropriate trail-gap. Holding SL/target unchanged; thesis (Q4 beat, AAA pursuit, dual broker upgrades) intact. No-op flagged: SL/target identical to stored — emitting HOLD instead via position_actions."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 124.12 vs entry 125.10 = -0.8%. SL 121 (-2.5%) intact. Defensive ETF; gold cooling but USD weakness + Middle East re-escalation tail still supports holding. No SL change warranted."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1725.00,
      "new_target": 1820.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 1757.10 vs entry 1700 = +3.4% unrealized. SL 1725 sits 1.8% below CMP — trail-gap discipline OK. Trail mandate (b) suggests trail to max(entry, last - 2%) = max(1700, 1722) = 1722; current SL 1725 already exceeds that. Keep SL at 1725 (entry+1.5%, locks small gain). No-op — converting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 4630.40 vs entry 4575 = +1.2%. SL 4540 = -2% below CMP. Q4 board meeting May 14 (5 sessions out, just outside 3-session binary window). Will reassess as event approaches; current SL provides 2% absorption for normal chop."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 6900.00,
      "new_target": 7400.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 7049 vs entry 6900 = +2.2% unrealized. Trail mandate (a): P&L >= +2% and SL (6960) is above entry — already at breakeven+. Keeping SL where it is (6960 sits 1.3% below CMP, within trail-gap discipline). No-op — flipping to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 820.00,
      "new_target": 900.00,
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 845.20 vs entry 838 = +0.9%. Stock surged +9.84% today on volume; Q4 results pending (binary). Tightening SL from 836 → 820 — wait, 820 < 836 = LOOSER, which guardrail rejects. Correcting: keep SL at 836 (sits 1.1% below CMP, within trail-gap floor). No change — emit HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 368.70 vs entry 369 = flat. SL 365 = -1% below CMP, target 388 = +5%. Stock at fresh ATH +6.61% today. SL already very tight — letting the breakout run with current bracket."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 815.00,
      "new_target": 860.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 822.55 vs entry 820 = +0.3%. SL 815 already 0.9% below CMP — at trail-gap floor. Stock at ATH on Q4 beat. No-op — emit HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "EXIT",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 30,
      "order_type": "MARKET",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 1279.10 vs entry 1259 = +1.6%. Stock gapped +9.5% then faded (high 1295.80, now 1279). EMA9 1201, SMA20 1235 well below CMP — gap may need to fill. Encora dilution + ICICI Direct downgrade are real overhangs. SL 1253 only 2% below; rather than risk gap-fill stop-out, lock the +1.6% gain on a momentum chase that's already extended. Net +₹600 on 30 shares."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 2990.00,
      "new_target": 3225.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 3034 vs entry 3025 = +0.3%. SL 2990 = 1.5% below CMP. Stock +9.2% today; defense rally extended +48% in April. Keeping SL/target unchanged — no-op, emit HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 800.00,
      "new_target": 855.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 807.30 vs entry 806 = +0.2%. SL 800 = 0.9% below CMP — at trail-gap floor. Q4 record revenue print already reflected. No-op — emit HOLD."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "+7.4% gain, SL 1035 already 2% below CMP (within trail-gap discipline). Thesis intact post Q4 beat + dual upgrades."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive position, SL 121 intact at -2.5%. Hold for hedge value."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "+3.4% gain, SL 1725 locks small profit at 1.8% below CMP. Governance overhang unchanged."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "May 14 Q4 board meeting is 5 sessions away — outside the 3-session binary window. Will reassess and tighten/exit closer to event."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "+2.2% gain, SL 6960 at breakeven+ already. Best-in-class Q4 numbers, multiple Buy targets above CMP."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 836 at -1.1% from CMP — at trail-gap floor; cannot loosen. Q4 binary pending. Letting stock work."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Fresh ATH on Q4 beat. SL 365 = -1% below CMP, tight bracket. Letting breakout run."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 815 = -0.9% below CMP, at trail-gap floor. Q4 beat + ATH; thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "EXIT",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Gap-up +9.5% then faded off 1295.80 high. Encora dilution + ICICI downgrade real risks. Locking +1.6% on momentum chase rather than waiting for SL."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defense breakout +9.2% today. SL 2990 at -1.5%. Letting it work."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Just entered; SL 800 already tight at -0.9%. Q4 beat + structural MF AUM growth."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HFCL",
      "current_action": "EXIT",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "OPEN BUY LIMIT @ 133.50 placed 1855m ago (~31 hours). Stale order — context has shifted significantly with broad rally today; cancel rather than let it fill on a different setup."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "LUPIN (Q4 results today — binary, no entry per rule 11). AUROPHARMA (promoter pledge increased 17.5% → 23.7%, governance flag — NO_ACTION per rule 13). DABUR (Q4 results today — binary, near 52w low, BEARISH research — skip). HINDPETRO (May 13 Q4, LPG under-recovery overhang — skip). TITAGARH/GRSE already held. CHOLAHLDNG, VEDL, BHARATFORG, GABRIEL, POLYCAB — keep monitoring; no fresh entries today given full book + cluster discipline. BAJAJ-AUTO 5-session cooldown from Day-10 exit not yet cleared without new catalyst.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 11 CNC positions, all near entry (held 0 days). No need to add new names — focus is on managing existing book through earnings season. Cumulative -53.72% experiment P&L demands ruthless discipline: take profits when offered, exit on thesis-break, do not chase post-gap breakouts. EXITing COFORGE (+1.6%) and stale HFCL pending order. All other positions HOLD with current SLs which are appropriately positioned. Will reassess HAL pre-May14, TITAGARH around Q4, and trim positions that approach binary events."
}
